err_auth_invalid_credentials: We couldn't sign in with those details.
err_auth_keychain_denied: Access to your system Keychain was denied.
err_imap_connection_failed: Can't reach the mail server right now.
err_imap_uid_validity_changed: This mailbox needs a full resync.
err_smtp_rate_limited: Sending too fast — we'll slow down.
err_db_migration_failed: We couldn't update the local database.
err_ai_context_too_long: There's too much context for this model.
err_fs_permission_denied: We don't have permission to that location.
err_internal: Something went wrong on our side.
